tableSchema:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS councillors (
    councillor_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    council TEXT,
    name TEXT,
    party TEXT,
    title TEXT,
    ward TEXT,
    image TEXT,
    profileLink TEXT
, rawParty TEXT
)
partyHistorySchema:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS partyHistroy (
    partyhistory_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    councillor_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT,
  title TEXT,
   rawParty TEXT
,   date TEXT
)
